scripts.dev:ts: echo --- [1/3] Compilando TypeScript... && tsc && echo ✅ Build passou! && echo --- [2/3] Verificando lint... && eslint src && echo ✅ Lint passou! && echo --- [3/3] Iniciando servidor... && nodemon --watch src --ext ts --exec ts-node src/server.ts || echo ❌ Verificacao falhou — corrija os erros acima antes de continuar.
scripts.build: tsc && echo ✅ Build passou! || echo ❌ Build FALHOU
scripts.lint: eslint src && echo ✅ Lint passou! || echo ❌ Lint FALHOU
